{{Infobox character
| name = Furman
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Shadow, The Elder Empire: Sea
| titles = servant, assistant, leader of the alchemists, duplicate
| abilities = alchemist
| affiliations = Mason
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Furman serves as an assistant and servant to the alchemist [[Bareius]]. In this capacity, he performs various administrative and logistical duties, such as managing velvet bags of silver and gold coins, taking notes on a clipboard while standing behind [[Bareius]]'s chair, and preparing rooms. He is also responsible for providing signals during meetings and executing specific plans designed to distract or sideline [[Champions]]. While he often appears as a subordinate who chuckles uncomfortably or follows orders, he has demonstrated the ability to act decisively, such as when he pushed [[Bareius]] to the deck of a ship and later attempted to escape via a dive into the water.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Furman]] is [[Bareius]]'s servant.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Furman]] is an alchemist who looks exactly like [[Bareius]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Furman serves as an assistant to [[Nathanael Bareius]]. Alongside [[Bareius]], he takes on the responsibility of leading the alchemists. It is eventually revealed that Furman is actually a duplicate of [[Bareius]] and holds the status of a [[Mason]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Furman]] is an assistant.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Furman]] leads the alchemists alongside [[Bareius]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Furman]] is an assistant to [[Nathanael Bareius]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Furman]] is [[Bareius]]'s duplicate.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Furman]] is a [[Mason]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
